patient.query: Yeah, I guess I am feeling pretty anxious about it all. It’s like my mind just keeps racing with worst-case scenarios, and I don’t really know how to stop it. I worry that I’m not doing enough or that others are judging my work. It makes me feel kind of inadequate, you know?

automatic_thoughts: my mind just keeps racing with worst-case scenarios
I worry that I’m not doing enough

I start thinking everyone else
